abilities.name: Shrouded in the Shallows
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may remove a Drift token to reduce the damage by 2.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

actions.name: Shove
actions.effects: Move the target 2". For each raise this action receives, move the target an additional +1".

triggers.name: Friendly Waters
triggers.text: This model gains a Drift token.

actions.name: Blowdart
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model is within 1" of a Tide marker, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Sinkhole
triggers.text: Make a Tide marker into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Friendly Waters
triggers.text: This model gains a Drift token.

actions.name: Under the Surface
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a friendly Scheme or Tide marker within range.
actions.effects: Place this model into base contact with the target. Then, make either a Scheme or Tide marker in base contact with the target and remove the target.

triggers.name: Friendly Waters
triggers.text: This model gains a Drift token.
